strengths: Demonstrates strong information literacy through rigorous use of the CRAAP test to evaluate sources
Concrete evidence of digital-modeling ATL skills via a Tinkercad screenshot
Effective self-management and organization shown by a personal timetable and well-structured digital folder system
weaknesses: Research tables list questions without reporting findings or explaining how those findings informed design decisions
Creative thinking section outlines general ideation methods but lacks specific examples of how techniques shaped the final keychain design
Application of research outcomes to the productâs quality and features is not explicitly linked
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The Applying Skills criterion is well supported by clear evidence of information-literacy and self-management skills. To strengthen this area, link research findings directly to design choices and provide concrete examples of how ideation techniques influenced your final product.

strengths: Detailed, sequenced plan with clear priorities and time estimates demonstrating strong organizational skills
Engaging connection to personal interest through the intended 3D-printed keychain, showing clear relevance and motivation
Adaptability shown by reflecting on timeline adjustments in response to challenges
weaknesses: Success criteria are not fully measurableââFontâ lacks defined thresholds and attributes like tolerance accuracy or print resolution need quantifiable targets
Learning goal (âlearn how to 3D printâ) is stated too broadly and only appears later rather than up front
Resources (printers, software, materials) are not specified for each phase, reducing the feasibility detail of the plan
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The planning section shows excellent organization, personal connection and adaptability, but would benefit from a SMART learning goal stated at the start, fully measurable success criteria for each attribute and an explicit list of resources to ensure complete feasibility.

strengths: Thoughtful reflection on how the project broadened understanding of 3D printingâs global applications and improved time management skills
Inclusion of exhibition and peer feedback demonstrates engagement with audience and constructive critique integration
Articulate discussion of personal growth, showing meaningful self-reflection and learning impact
weaknesses: Product evaluation table justifications are incomplete or truncated, limiting clarity on how criteria were met
Evaluation against success criteria lacks full evidence and detailed examples for each criterion
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The reflection demonstrates depth of insight into personal and learning growth and effectively incorporates external feedback. To elevate this section, complete all evaluation justifications with specific evidence and link each success criterion to clear, detailed examples of performance.

annotations.comment: Criteria table is detailed but missing clear measures for the 'Font' criterion and thresholds. Ensure each success criterion is fully described with measurable indicators.
The personal interest narrative is engaging but the learning goal isnât explicitly stated until later. Consider stating your learning goal upfront for clarity.
Consider defining measurable success criteria that link product attributesâlike tolerance accuracy or print resolutionâto your objectives.
The learning goal âlearn how to 3D printâ is clear but too broad. Make it SMART by specifying target software skills or print quality benchmarks.
Great to see a detailed, sequenced plan with priorities and time estimates. This demonstrates strong planning organization.
The table organizes research questions well but could include outcomes or key findings to demonstrate how each informed your project.
Your product evaluation table provides ratings and justifications, but some justifications are truncated and missing detailâcomplete each to demonstrate thorough evaluation against your criteria.
You clearly connect the project to your personal passion by stating the intended 3D printed keychain product. Nice articulation of personal relevance.
Your timeline is thorough, but consider specifying resources (e.g., printers, software, materials) required for each phase to enhance feasibility.
The Tinkercad screenshot provides concrete evidence of your digital modeling process and technical ATL skills in action.
Reflecting on timeline adjustments shows adaptability and self-awareness in response to challenges.
You effectively describe applying information literacy skills, outlining how you located and evaluated sources to support your learning goal.
The research questions are comprehensive, but linking findings directly to design decisions would strengthen your evidence of skills impacting product outcomes.
Using the CRAAP test to evaluate sources shows strong critical thinking and information literacyâwell applied.
Thorough CRAAP evaluation of sources demonstrates rigorous information literacy and attention to research quality.
Your use of a personal timetable and digital folder system clearly demonstrates effective self-management and organization skills.
You reflect thoughtfully on how this project enhanced your global perspective of 3D printingâs potential across industries.
Including exhibition feedback demonstrates engagement with your audience and acknowledgement of constructive critique.
The creative thinking section outlines general approaches but lacks concrete examples showing how specific ideation techniques influenced your final keychain design.
You articulate how the project broadened your understanding of 3D printing applications and strengthened your time-management skills, showing meaningful self-reflection.
The digital feedback platform screenshot highlights peer recognition and suggestions, showing effective integration of formative feedback.
